signup.title: Welcome to Folio
signup.subtitle: Create your account to get started

authStart.title: Welcome to Folio
authStart.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to get started

connectExtension.title: Extension Connected
connectExtension.message: Your browser extension has been successfully connected to Folio. You can now save items directly from your browser.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address

password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.complexity: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character

pocket.title: Import from Pocket
pocket.description: Connect your Pocket account to import all your saved articles to Folio. This process will:

benefits.importArticles: Import all your saved Pocket articles
benefits.preserveProgress: Preserve your reading progress and tags
benefits.keepAccount: Keep your original Pocket account unchanged

pocket.note: You'll be redirected to Pocket to authorise the import. This is secure — we only read your saved articles.

success.title: Import Started!
success.description: Your Pocket data is being imported in the background. This may take a few minutes depending on how many articles you have saved.
success.note: You can continue using Folio normally. Your imported articles will appear as they're processed.

addArticle.title: Add to Folio
addArticle.infoText: Save articles, videos, and more to read later. Everything syncs across your devices.

initialSync.subMessage: We're syncing your saved articles. This might take a moment.

favorites.subMessage: Tap the star to save your favourite articles here.

tagged.subMessage: Add tags like 'travel' or 'recipes' to organise your saves.

archived.subMessage: When you're done reading, archive articles to keep things tidy.

short.subMessage: Quick articles you save will appear here.

long.subMessage: In-depth articles you save will appear here.

default.subMessage: Save articles you want to read later. They'll appear here.

all.subMessage: Save articles you want to read later. They'll appear here.

restoring.subMessage: Your saved articles are on the way.

deleteConfirmation.title: Delete Article
deleteConfirmation.message: Are you sure you want to delete this article? This action cannot be undone.
